seoTitle: Crafers West vs Craigmore — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Crafers West and Craigmore. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Crafers West vs Craigmore: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Crafers West and Craigmore.
heading: Crafers West vs Craigmore — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Crafers West, South Australia and Craigmore, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Crafers West has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Craigmore (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Crafers West or Craigmore safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Crafers West has a flood risk score of 37/100, while Craigmore scores 39/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Crafers West scores 22/100 for bushfire risk. Craigmore scores 61/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Crafers West or Craigmore?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Crafers West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.25% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
